mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, worker_conn_status, uid, worker_seq_number, console_ip, worker_ip, cluster_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_worker_status WHERE worker_seq_number = #{workerSeqNumber} limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_worker_status WHERE worker_seq_number = #{workerSeqNumber} and worker_conn_status = 'CONNECTED' limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_worker_status WHERE cluster_id = #{clusterId} and worker_conn_status = #{workerConnStatus,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.comm.constants.worker.WorkerConnStatus}

SELECT
FROM dm_worker_status WHERE console_ip = #{consoleIp} AND worker_conn_status= #{workerConnStatus,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.comm.constants.worker.WorkerConnStatus}

SELECT
FROM dm_worker_status WHERE worker_conn_status = 'CONNECTED' AND gmt_modified < #{checkPoint}
mapper.update:
UPDATE dm_worker_status SET
console_ip = #{consoleIp},
worker_ip = #{workerIp},
worker_conn_status = #{workerConnStatus}, gmt_modified = now() WHERE worker_seq_number = #{workerSeqNumber}
UPDATE dm_worker_status SET worker_conn_status = #{workerConnStatus}, gmt_modified = now() WHERE id= #{id}
